text: I feel a quiet sense of curiosity and anticipation as I step into this environment. The glass walls and purposeful displays signal an arena of inquiry and creativity. Upon seeing the "R+D"—Research and Development—wall, illuminated with thoughtful texts about human connection and innovation, I feel intellectually engaged. The words on the screen invite me to reflect on the everyday as an adventure of questioning and observation. Here, knowledge isn't just preserved but is lived and questioned, and I feel both a participant and a witness in the unfolding philosophical dialogue.
